name: Nes Golfklubb (also known as Rommen Golfklubb)
description: Open parkland-style course with long tree-lined fairways, water hazards, and bunkers. All activities centered around the barn. New junior tee (Tee 28, 2,800m) added in 2022.

organization.clubOrganization:
Founded: 2009

New junior tee (Tee 28, 2,800m) added in 2022. Planning to restore short course on old short course area, expected ready summer 2025

2025.greenFeeDescription:
300 NOK (ordinary), 200 NOK (member) - up to 18 years

100 NOK discount for Norwegian Senior Golf members

[object Object]

Opening hours: Information available on banestatus (course status page)
2025.greenFeeDescription_en:
300 NOK (standard), 200 NOK (member) - up to 18 years

100 NOK discount for Norwegian Senior Golf members

Opening hours: Information available on the course status page

2026.greenFeeDescription: Weekdays 480 NOK, Weekends 580 NOK, 9-hole 300 NOK, Twilight (after 19:00) 300 NOK, Junior (up to 18 years) 300 NOK. Member prices: Weekdays 380, Weekends 480, 9-hole 250, Twilight 250, Junior 200. Members can bring 1 guest with 100 NOK discount on 18-hole greenfee. Norsk Senior Golf members and Nes Golfklubb members get 100 NOK discount on 18-hole greenfee. PGA card holders: 1 free round per season. Golfamore valid all days.
2026.notes: Prices listed on website from 2025 season, likely valid for 2026 until updated. Booking via Golfbox. Guests can book 1 week in advance.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Weekdays 480 NOK, Weekends 580 NOK, 9-hole 300 NOK, Twilight (after 19:00) 300 NOK, Junior (up to 18 years) 300 NOK. Member prices: Weekdays 380, Weekends 480, 9-hole 250, Twilight 250, Junior 200. Members may bring 1 guest with 100 NOK discount on 18-hole green fee. Norwegian Senior Golf members and Nes Golf Club members receive 100 NOK discount on 18-hole green fee. PGA card holders: 1 free round per season. Golfamore valid all days.
2026.notes_en: Prices listed on website from 2025 season, likely valid for 2026 until updated. Booking via Golfbox. Guests can book 1 week in advance.

meta.note: Website (rommengolfpark.no) under construction. Uses same facilities as Nes Golfklubb (nesgolf.no). Pricing scraped from nesgolf.no/banen/gjestespill.

name_en: Nes Golf Club (also known as Rommen Golf Club)
description_en: Open parkland-style course with long tree-lined fairways, water hazards, and bunkers. All activities centred around the barn. New junior tee (Tee 28, 2,800m) added in 2022.
